feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Agentic AI Bootcamp
entry.content: I am currently in a NU Bootcamp for AI, which is taught by faculty and PhD mentors. I am looking forward to learning more about agentic AI and its applications. Specifically, I am looking forward to learning how to use AI to further knowledge. Additionally, I will have the oppertunity to complete a six week research project. I am very excited for what is to come in the bootcamp!
entry.summary: 2026 Summer AI Bootcamp at Northwestern University
